What is the rated supply voltage for the.query: What is the rated supply voltage for the main control panel?
What is the rated supply voltage for the.answer: The main control panel is rated for 480 VAC, three-phase supply per the equipment data plate and Section 3.1 of the service manual.

citations.snippet: Main control panel rated supply: 480 VAC, 3-phase, 60 Hz. Do not connect to 208 VAC service without the step-up transformer kit.

bm25_top5.text: Main control panel rated supply: 480 VAC, 3-phase, 60 Hz. Do not connect to 208 VAC service without the step-up transformer kit.

List the pre-operation checks before sta.query: List the pre-operation checks before starting pressurized fuel transfer.
List the pre-operation checks before sta.answer: Before pressurized transfer: (1) verify high-level shutoff pre-test PASS, (2) confirm bonding cables attached, (3) inspect nozzle strainer in REFUEL position, (4) ensure wet/dry sensor indicators are GREEN on the main panel.

citations.snippet: Pre-operation checklist — pressurized transfer: high-level shutoff pretest; bonding; strainer position; wet/dry indicators GREEN.
Do not initiate fuel flow until all trucks on that aircraft side are bonded and the panel pretest completes without fault codes.

bm25_top5.text: Pre-operation checklist — pressurized transfer: high-level shutoff pretest; bonding; strainer position; wet/dry indicators GREEN.

What is the maximum water pressure allow.query: What is the maximum water pressure allowed for manual rinsing?
What is the maximum water pressure allow.answer: Manual rinsing must not exceed 175 PSI. Use the regulated wash wand; higher pressure may damage seals and sensor housings [1][2].

citations.snippet: Manual rinse: maximum water pressure 175 PSI (1206 kPa). Do not use fire-main pressure without a reducing valve.
Table 7-2 Wash limits — rinse wand 175 PSI max; foam lance 100 PSI max.

What torque is specified for the braid c.query: What torque is specified for the braid clamp fasteners?
What torque is specified for the braid c.answer: Braid clamp fasteners are torqued to 25 in-lb ± 2 in-lb per the connector assembly table.

citations.snippet: Braid clamp fastener torque: 25 in-lb (2.8 N·m), tolerance ±2 in-lb. Recheck after thermal cycle.
